headline: Agentic tooling pushed toward autonomous and local execution while a cluster of recovery-oriented techniques entered the field.
body: The week's rotation centered on agents that build and run themselves: NotebookLM was reframed as a full agent with a cloud computer that writes code and assembles sources, and Gemma 4 26B ran 10 parallel subagents under a single controller locally at over 170 tokens per second. Local models and educational curriculum broke out alongside power iteration, with CS50's introductory AI series anchoring the curriculum signal. Lean agent construction surfaced through Hermes Blank Slate mode and an agentic SEO system wiring Claude Code to Search Console data. A new entrant cluster of data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection appeared without yet attaching to specific items.
